zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Neville於從1409年10月9日到1411年出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，她的父親Ralph Neville48歲，母親Joan de Beaufort36歲。她於1424年10月14日與Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年9月20日在英國艾可普萊，埋葬在英國艾可普萊。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Neville was born from 9 October 1409 to 1411, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, her father, Ralph Neville, was 48 and her mother, Joan de Beaufort, was 36. She married Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham on 14 October 1424, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 20 September 1480, in Pleshy, Essex, England, and was buried in Pleshey, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Neville est née du 9 octobre 1409 au 1411, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beaufort, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham le 14 octobre 1424, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1480, à Pleshy, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Pleshey, Essex, Angleterre.

Lei sposato Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham il 14 ottobre 1424, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1480, nel Pleshy, Essex, England, e fu sepolta a Pleshey, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Nevilleがから1409年10月9日まで1411年にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは48歳，母Joan de Beaufortは36歳であった。1424年10月14日にイギリスでHumphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1480年9月20日にイギリスエセックスプレシュイで死去し，イギリスエセックスプレシーにて埋葬された。

ko.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤조우
ko.Grey Friar's, London, Middlesex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Neville(이)가 1409년 10월 9일부터 1411년 까지 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Beaufort(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1424년 10월 14일 영국에서 Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 9월 20일 영국 에세스 플레스히에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 플레셰이에 묻혔다.

pt.9 October 1409-1411–20 September 1480: de 9 de outubro de 1409 a 1411–20 de setembro de 1480
pt.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: Anjou, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.Raby Castle, Raby-With-Keverstone, Durha: Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Grey Friar's, London, Middlesex, England: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Neville nasceu de 9 de outubro de 1409 a 1411, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beaufort, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham em 14 de outubro de 1424, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1480, em Pleshy, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Pleshey, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Neville родилась с 9 октября 1409 по 1411 в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beaufort, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham 14 октября 1424 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 сентября 1480 г. в местности плеши, эссекс, Англия и была похоронена в местности плеши, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Neville nació desde 9 de octubre de 1409 hasta 1411, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Neville, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joan de Beaufort, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham el 14 de octubre de 1424, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1480, en Pleshy, Essex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Pleshey, Essex, Inglaterra.
